name: hall-booking-system-desktop
description: Tauri desktop wrapper for the hall booking system.

scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed && npm run frontend:build
scripts.desktop:prepare:tauri: npm run prisma:generate && npm run frontend:build:desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:prepare:tauri && npx tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:prepare:tauri && npx tauri build
scripts.desktop:build:windows: npm run desktop:prepare:tauri && npx tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu
